arts.ttl: Man City could launch a big-money move to sign Newcastle star
arts.sum: Manchester City are interested in signing the Newcastle United midfielder Sandro Tonali. According to a report via Manchester World, they could submit and offer to sign the Italian midfielder at the end of the season. arts.ttl: Monchi travels for Aston Villa signing – Holds talks, spotted at hotel
arts.sum: A week ago, we covered claims from Norway that Aston Villa are leading the race to sign Rosenborg BK’s Sverre Nypan in the summer window. Two days later, the 18-year-old’s father, Arne Nypan, said he’s been working on his son’s transfer. arts.sum: Fabrizio Romano Transfer News: Cunha to Man Utd BOMB, Man City LOVE Gibbs-White, Alonso set for Real If any of the clubs where he played come and the coach decides to go, there is already a compensation fixed for Alonso, and Real Madrid are the club wanted by Xabi.

arts.sum: JACK GAUGHAN: City boss Guardiola might have deleted WhatsApp and claimed to have no social media on his phone but that hasn't always been the case in his time at the club.
